mapper.insert: insert into user_test (login_id, password, username, role, auth_provider) values (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{username}, #{role}, #{authProvider})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role, auth_provider FROM user_test WHERE login_id = #{loginId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, role, auth_provider FROM user_test WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
